violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in adjustment/repair (separating at the bottom). Gasket to be reattached to ensure proper seal on walk-in cooler door. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the back of the evaporator unit was observed to have an accumulation of dust. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The kitchen hand-washing sink was observed to be not readily accessible to the front counter employee. Per the Owner, equipment is to be adjusted/moved to allow for easy access by the front counter employee. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
